message:
fix: ComputeOverview IIFEs → useMemo, consecutiveFailures mock type, ServiceStatus i18n (#5779)

- Replace IIFE with useMemo for filteredGPUNodes in ComputeOverview (#5774)
- Fix consecutiveFailures mock type from [] to 0 in 25 test files (#5771)
- Fix hardcoded English string in ServiceStatus stats total (#5772)

Fixes #5771 #5772 #5774

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
